REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED BECAUSE THE MOVING PARTY FAILS TO SHIFT ITS BURDEN AND THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT: WHETHER THE NOTICE CAUSED PLAINTIFF PREJUDICE; WHETHER THE MAILED NOTICE WAS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CC 2924B; PLAINTIFF'S REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION HINGE ON THE WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE CAUSE OF ACTION, INCLUDING THE QUIET TITLE, DECLARATORY RELIEF AND THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. IN ADDITION MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350(B). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP 437C(G) AND CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-04-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Continued To Feb-26-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Mary Kate Sullivan; Severson & Werson, APC; 415-398-3344; appearing as counsel for defendants MEB Loan Trust II, U.S. Bank National Association, and Specialized Loan Servicing LLC.
Patrick A. Hormillosa; Lepera + Associates, PC; 415-362-2529; appearing as counsel for plaintiffs Jai D. Gupta and Shivani Gupta.

Defendants contest the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED because the moving party fails to shift its burden and there are triable issues of fact: Whether the notice caused Plaintiff prejudice; whether the mailed notice was in compliance with CC 2924b; plaintiff's remaining causes of action hinge on the wrongful foreclosure cause of action, including the quiet title, declaratory relief and the prayer for punitive damages. In addition motion for summary adjudication fails to comply with CRC 3.1350(b).

Prevailing party to prepare order in accordance with CCP 437c(g) and CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-06-2023 Continued To Oct-16-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT MEB LOAN TRUST II, U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION,, SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is continued to October 16, 2023 on Court's own motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
